title: Excitement During PR Discuss On Parenting & Addressing 21st Century Challenges
description: Excitement at the Monthly General Meeting / PR Clinic, Of The Nigerian Institute Of Public Relations (NIPR) Lagos State Chapter On Thursday June 2, 2022, Featuring Dayo Oladele Ilori, Marketing Commun
html: Excitement at the Monthly General Meeting / PR Clinic, Of The Nigerian Institute Of Public Relations (NIPR) Lagos State Chapter On Thursday June 2, 2022, Featuring Dayo Oladele Ilori, Marketing Communication Expert And Author of Boy Child Advocate, With the Theme: Communication and Responsible Parenting, Addressing the 21st Century Challenges.
